attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT OBJECT_ID,
NULL AS  DISCOUNT_ID, 
NULL AS  POST_TERM_CLAUSE_FLAG,
NULL AS  APPLIED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, 
NULL AS  PROMO_VERSION,
 APPR_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG,
NULL AS  REQ_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG,
NULL AS MODIFIER_LINE_ID,
 DISC_PERCENTAGE, 
 DISC_AMOUNT,
NULL AS PRICE_USED_FOR_ADJUSTMENT,
NULL AS NET_PRICE_AFT_ADJUSTMENT,
NULL AS PRICING_PHASE_CODE, 
NULL AS MODIFIEDER_LINE_TYPE_CODE,
NULL AS LIST_LINE_NUMBER, 
NULL AS INCLUDE_ON_RETURN_FLAG, 
 DISC_METHOD,
NULL AS MODIFIER_LEVEL_CODE, 
NULL AS BUCKET, 
NULL AS AUTOMATIC_FLAG,
NULL AS UPDATE_ALLOWABLE_FLAG,
NULL AS UPDATED_FLAG, 
NULL AS APPLIED_FLAG, 
NULL AS PRINT_ON_INVOICE_FLAG,
NULL AS CHANGE_REASON_CODE, 
'' AS CHANGE_REASON_TEXT, 
 PROMOTION_CODE,
 OREPLACE(PROMOTION_NAME,CHR(10),'') AS PROMOTION_NAME,
NULL AS CHANNER_PROG_ALLIGNMENT,
NULL AS MODIFIED_FROM,
NULL AS MODIFIED_TO, 
NULL AS ESTIMATED_FLAG, 
NULL AS CHARGE_TYPE_CODE,
NULL AS CHARGE_SUBTYPE_CODE,
NULL AS RANGE_BREAK_QUANTITY,
NULL AS ACCURAL_CONVERSION_RATE,
NULL AS ACCURAL_FLAG,
NULL AS BENEFIT_QUANTITY,
NULL AS BENEFIT_UOM_CODE,
NULL AS PRICE_BREAK_TYPE_CODE, 
NULL AS SUBSTITUTION_ATTRIBUTE,
NULL AS PRORATION_TYPE_CODE, 
NULL AS CREDIT_OR_CHARGE_FLAG,
NULL AS INC_IN_SALES_PERFORMANCE,
NULL AS REBATE_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE,
NULL AS REBATE_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE,
NULL AS REBATE_PAYMENT_SYSTEM_CODE,
 ROUND(TO_NUMBER (OPERAND_PER_QUANTITY), 2) as OPERAND_PER_QUANTITY,
NULL AS ADJUSTED_AMT_PER_QUANTITY,
NULL(timestamp(0)) AS EXPIRATION_DATE, 
NULL AS LIST_LINE_ID, 
 OREPLACE(DISC_NAME,CHR(10),'') as DISC_NAME,
NULL AS ADJUST_PRICE_LIST_AMT,
EL.ADJUSTED_AMOUNT,
 /* ROUND(TO_NUMBER(ADJUSTED_AMOUNT),6) as ADJUSTED_AMOUNT , */
NULL(timestamp(0)) AS UPDATED_DATE, 
NULL AS UPDATED_BY, 
 CREATION_DT,
NULL AS CREATED_BY, 
NULL AS  MODIFIER_HEADER_ID,
QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID, 
EL.CONCESSION_ID AS CONCESSION_ID, 
NULL AS CONCESSION_TYPE,
NULL AS  CONCESSION_VALUE,
NULL AS CONCESSION_VALUE_TYPE, 
 'Y' AS CONCESSION_APPLIED,
NULL AS DISCOUNT_VERSION,
NULL(timestamp(0)) AS EDW_UPDATED_DATE,
INSTANCE_ID,
QUOTE_ID,
EXT_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,
UNROUNDED_EXT_AMOUNT
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RW_CQ_QUTE_LN_CNCS_KFKA_RNWL EL
Where EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LNE_CONCES_KAFKA_RNWL')
/* Commenting as part of CCWR
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EL.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID, EL.OBJECT_ID ORDER BY EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1 */
